entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A drought and heat tolerant crop that provides a major source of dietary protein in tropical and semi-arid regions

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: Environmental stress characterized by lack of water, to which pigeonpea is tolerant

entities.name: HEAT
entities.description: Environmental stress characterized by high temperatures, to which pigeonpea is tolerant

entities.name: TROPICAL AND SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The geographic regions where pigeonpea is primarily grown

entities.name: SEED PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of protein present in the seeds of the crop

entities.name: HIGH DENSITY LINKAGE MAPS
entities.description: Genomic maps used to identify quantitative trait loci associated with specific traits

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCI
entities.description: Regions of DNA associated with a particular phenotypic trait

entities.name: 100-SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: An agronomic trait representing the weight of 100 seeds

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of seed produced by the crop

entities.name: DAYS TO FIRST FLOWER
entities.description: The time interval from planting to the appearance of the first flower

entities.name: GROWTH HABIT
entities.description: The characteristic form or manner of growth of the plant

entities.name: GENOTYPING-BY-SEQUENCING
entities.description: A high-throughput method used to genotype mapping populations

entities.name: MAIN EFFECT QTL
entities.description: Quantitative trait loci that exert a direct effect on a trait

entities.name: EPISTATIC QTL
entities.description: Quantitative trait loci that affect a trait through interactions with other loci

entities.name: CONSENSUS LINKAGE MAPS
entities.description: Linkage maps created by combining data from multiple mapping populations

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED RECURRENT SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding strategy using markers to improve specific traits over successive cycles

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: A form of marker-assisted selection that uses genome-wide markers to predict breeding values
